title: salix × ardana
intro: Salix × ardana, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis, is a fast-growing deciduous tree or shrub commonly found in wetlands. The bark and leaves of Salix × ardana possess medicinal properties, particularly salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix × ardana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various health conditions, such as arthritis and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Salix × ardana can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures for topical and internal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
